posts.author: Johan Lindøm
posts.content: “It's a fact—everyone is ignorant in some way or another because of their dopamine level. Ignorance is our deepest secret. And it is one of the scariest things out there, because those of us who are most ignorant are also the ones who often don't know it or don't want to admit it. We dont know it because we cannot see what we are missing. We cannot see we are missing UV and IR light. Here is a quick test: If you have never changed your mind about some fundamental tenet of your belief, if you have never questioned the basics, and if you have no wish to do so, then you are likely ignorant. Check…

posts.author: Mat.I
posts.content: "If your cells no longer sense real light, if your dopamine is flatlined by artificial rhythms, if your mitochondria are drowned in noise instead of tuned to nature’s signals - you don’t malfunction, you disconnect. MK Ultra was never just a program - it was a prototype. When coherence is lost, so is agency. And in a low-dopamine state, the cage becomes comfortable. Every lost photon is a lost choice. This is how sovereignty is erased: not by chains, but by clocks that no longer receive solar input and are desynchronised by alien light (including the light you cannot see). Biology was never me…

posts.author: DavidL
posts.content: When I was seven years old, my father took me to Head Smashed In Buffalo Jump and said, "You know what happens to animals and people that run with the herd, that do things out of fear? They are lead over a cliff to their death. Don't follow the crowd David, think for yourself. If you find yourself in the majority be worried."
